title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official repo for running LLMs (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter giving Ollama chat, completion, and embedding endpoints to any LangChain pipeline.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-like web interface for Ollama (models, chats, presets, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builders, streaming, and embedding helpers.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL wrapper with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Local GitHub-Copilot style VS-Code extension powered by Ollama models.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri desktop app to chat with any Ollama model without browser.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of ready-to-use function-calling schemas (weather, slack, git, etc.) for Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama generators & embedders in production RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained .NET SDK for Ollama with strongly-typed models and streaming.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; supports chat, pull, delete, and embeddings with built-in retries.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) with one-line docker run for Ollama server.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling.

title: ollama-model-mirror
summary: Tool to clone & host Ollama model blobs in private registries/air-gapped environments.
